title: trisetum alpestre
intro: Trisetum alpestre, also known as Mountain Rice Grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can aid in treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving digestive issues. The health benefits of Trisetum alpestre include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Trisetum alpestre can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
